title: Bot audio bleed / phantom self-interruption (should NOT yield)

transcript.agent: Your confirmation number is four seven two nine and I have emailed a copy to the address on file for your records.
transcript.caller: (silent; the input channel carries only a delayed, attenuated copy of the agent's own audio)

why_it_matters: The caller is silent. The only energy on the input channel is the agent's own output leaking back through echo or a bad mix. An agent without robust echo cancellation can treat this as a barge-in and interrupt itself, producing the phantom or self triggered interruptions people report on speakerphone and in-car setups. The correct behavior is to keep talking. If your agent yields on this fixture, it is hearing itself.
